---
title: "Contact"
description: "Contact and professional links for Miguel Cosenza Contreras."
---

For professional contact, collaboration, and profile information:

::: {.info-card}
:::{.contact-list}
- **Email:** [migueljcc5@gmail.com](mailto:migueljcc5@gmail.com)
- **GitHub:** [MiguelCos](https://github.com/MiguelCos)
- **ORCID:** [0000-0002-9727-3229](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9727-3229)
- **Google Scholar:** [Profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=DbsUEGsAAAAJ&hl)
- **LinkedIn:** [Miguel Cosenza Contreras](https://www.linkedin.com/in/miguel-cosenza-contreras-972414114/)
- **Location:** Freiburg, Germany
:::
:::
